answer.en: HTML Beautifier adds proper indentation and line breaks to compact or minified HTML, making it easy to read, edit, and debug.

question.en: Does beautifying HTML change the page appearance?

answer.en: No. Beautification only adds insignificant whitespace between HTML elements. The rendered page appears identical.

question.en: Can I use this to understand minified HTML?

answer.en: Yes. Beautifying minified HTML from a production site is a common way to read and understand its structure.

question.en: Is there a file size limit?

answer.en: The tool works entirely in your browser and handles files of any reasonable size. Very large files (>5 MB) may be slow.

description.en: All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
Get results immediately — no waiting for server processing.
Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers with no installation required.
No subscription, no limits, no hidden costs. Free forever.
